feed.title: ohiobankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Ohio Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free Ohio bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, Ohio exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

entry.title: Bank Accounts and Bankruptcy in Ohio
entry.summary: How bankruptcy affects your bank account in Ohio. Levies, setoff rights, protecting deposits, and what to do before filing in N.D. Ohio and S.D. Ohio.

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13 in Ohio?
entry.summary: How to buy a car during Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Ohio. Court motions, trustee approval, interest rates, and budget requirements.

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in Ohio
entry.summary: When and how you can buy a home after filing bankruptcy in Ohio. Waiting periods for FHA, VA, and conventional loans, credit rebuilding, and Ohio programs.

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy in Ohio
entry.summary: What happens to your car lease in Ohio bankruptcy. Assume or reject, 60-day deadline, early termination fees, and practical options.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy Eligibility in Ohio
entry.summary: Chapter 13 eligibility requirements in Ohio. Debt limits, regular income, plan length, and requirements for filing in N.D. Ohio and S.D. Ohio.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payments in Ohio
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 payment amounts are calculated in Ohio. Disposable income, plan length, missed payments, and modification options in N.D. Ohio and S.D.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Ohio -- Payment Plans, Timeline
entry.summary: Guide to Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Ohio. Payment plan basics, timeline, 3-5 year commitment, and what to expect during the repayment process.

entry.title: Chapter 7 Bankruptcy Eligibility in Ohio
entry.summary: Do you qualify for Chapter 7 bankruptcy in Ohio? Means test, income limits, prior filing bars, and eligibility requirements for N.D. Ohio and S.D. Ohio.

entry.title: Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Ohio -- Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline
entry.summary: Complete guide to Chapter 7 bankruptcy in Ohio. Covers Ohio exemptions (homestead: $145,425), means test, timeline, and what to expect.
